calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS EVGENII SVERDLOV, NICHOLAS ZELTZER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR as moot pursuant to the dismissal.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745, email: lmartinez@sftc.org. (D302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Evgenii Sverdlovs Motion To Compel Responses From Paula Leiato To Written Discovery To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted For Order That All Objections Are Waived And For Monetary Sanctions Of 1047
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JACOB HARKER, TEL. NO. 1-415-624-7602 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EVGENII SVERDLOV's Motion To Compel Responses From Paula Leiato To Written Discovery To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted For Order That All Objections Are Waived And For Monetary Sanctions Of 1047 - Motion to compel is granted. No opposition filed. Paula Leiato is ordered to pay sanctions of $260.00 to moving party. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Notice Of Evgenii Sverdlovs Motion To Compel Responses From Gregory Chin To Written Discovery To Deem All Requests For Admissions Admitted For Order That All Objections Are Waived And For Monetary Sanctions Of 1047
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JACOB HARKER, TEL. NO. 1-415-624-7602 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
